common.title: Title
common.name: Name
common.invalidJson: Provider Options must be valid JSON.

llm.titleDesc: Enter a clear, descriptive name for this language model instance.
llm.vendorDesc: Choose the provider for this model.
llm.descriptionDesc: Provide a concise summary for this instance.
llm.endpointDesc: Specify the model's endpoint, e.g., http://localhost:8000
llm.apiKeyDesc: Optional secret token. Leave blank to keep the existing key when editing.
llm.timeoutDesc: Maximum wait time for a response (e.g., PT60S).
llm.maxRetriesDesc: Number of retry attempts if the request fails.
llm.visualOptionsDesc: Use these fields for common options. Any value in raw JSON below overrides visual values.
llm.providerOptionsJsonDesc: Optional provider-specific overrides. Use valid JSON.
llm.enabledDesc: Toggle to enable or disable this language model instance.
llm.toolsEnabledDesc: Enable tool calling (web search, weather, code execution). Disable for models that do not support function calling.
llm.modelSettingsDesc: Endpoint, model name, and API key.
llm.advancedDesc: Response format, capabilities, and provider overrides.
llm.statusDesc: Enable or disable this language model.
llm.titleRequired: A title is required for this language model instance.

token.generalDesc: Basic information about the API token.
token.titleDesc: A short name to identify this token.
token.descriptionDesc: Optional notes about how this token is used.
token.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Used by the deployment pipeline to index content.
token.tokenHint: Use this token in the Authorization header for API requests.

mcp.generalDesc: Title and description for this MCP server.
mcp.titleDesc: Provide a unique, descriptive name for this MCP server.
mcp.descriptionDesc: Summarize the purpose or intended use of this MCP server.
mcp.connectionDesc: How to connect to this MCP server.
mcp.connectionTypeDesc: Choose how this MCP server is accessed.
mcp.typeDesc: Define if this server runs synchronously or asynchronously.
mcp.endpointDescHttp: URL to reach the MCP server.
mcp.endpointDescCommand: Command and arguments to start the server.
mcp.urlDesc: Enter the base URL where this MCP server is accessible. Example: http://localhost:3000/mcp
mcp.commandDesc: The command to execute the MCP server. Example: npx, python, node
mcp.argumentsDesc: Arguments to pass to the command. Example: -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /path/to/dir
mcp.enabledDesc: Toggle to activate or deactivate this MCP server instance.
mcp.statusDesc: Enable or disable this MCP server.
mcp.titleRequired: A title is required for this MCP server.

se.generalDesc: Title and description for this engine.
se.titleDesc: Enter a unique, descriptive name for this search engine instance.
se.descriptionDesc: Briefly describe the purpose or scope of this search engine.
se.vendorDesc: Choose the backend technology powering this search engine.
se.endpointDesc: Enter the full URL of the search engine.

store.generalDesc: Title and description for this store.
store.titleDesc: Provide a unique, descriptive name for this embedding store instance.
store.descriptionDesc: Summarize the purpose or intended use of this embedding store.
store.vendorSelectDesc: Choose the backend technology powering this embedding store.
store.endpointUrlDesc: Enter the base URL where this embedding store is accessible. Example: http://localhost:8000
store.collectionNameDesc: Optional collection/index name used by the vector store.
store.credentialDesc: Optional token/credential. Leave blank to keep existing credential when editing.
store.visualOptionsDesc: Use these fields for common options. Any value in raw JSON below overrides visual values.
store.providerOptionsJsonDesc: Optional provider-specific overrides. Use valid JSON.
store.enabledDesc: Toggle to activate or deactivate this embedding store instance.
store.initializeSchemaDesc: Enable automatic schema initialization for the vector store.
store.titleRequired: A title is required for this embedding store.

embedding.settings: Configure an embedding model for vector generation.
embedding.generalDesc: Name and description for this embedding model.
embedding.modelNameDesc: A friendly name for the model.
embedding.descriptionDesc: Summarize the purpose or intended use of this embedding model.
embedding.providerDesc: Select the LLM instance or local transformer.
embedding.providerTypeDesc: Choose an LLM instance that supports embeddings, or select "Transformers (Local)" for ONNX models.
embedding.modelIdDesc: The technical identifier of the model.
embedding.modelPathDesc: Path to the ONNX model file on the filesystem.
embedding.tokenizerPathDesc: Path to the tokenizer.json file on the filesystem.
embedding.batchSizeDesc: Number of texts the model processes per batch. Useful for bulk imports.
embedding.enableGpuDesc: Enable hardware acceleration for local models that support GPU processing.
embedding.enabledDesc: Toggle to activate or deactivate this embedding model.
embedding.statusDesc: Enable or disable this embedding model.
embedding.modelPathRequired: Model path is required for local transformers.
embedding.tokenizerRequired: Tokenizer path is required for local transformers.

integration.generalDesc: Name and description for this integration.
integration.nameDesc: Choose a name that helps you and your team quickly recognize this integration.
integration.descDesc: Briefly explain what this integration does or why you're setting it up.
integration.descPlaceholder: Describe the integration's purpose or what it connects.
integration.typeDesc: Pick the platform or technology you want to connect with.
integration.endpointDesc: Enter the web address where Turing should connect to your system.
integration.nameRequired: Please give your integration a name.

snBehavior.resultsPerPageDesc: Set the number of search results displayed per page.
snBehavior.exactMatchDesc: Enable precise search for quoted terms using the default field.
snBehavior.wildcardDesc: Automatic wildcard behavior for broader matching.
snBehavior.addWildcardNoResultsDesc: If no results are found, automatically append a wildcard to the search term.
snBehavior.alwaysAddWildcardDesc: Always append a wildcard to each search term.
snBehavior.facetsDesc: Filtering options and faceted navigation settings.
snBehavior.enableFacetsDesc: Allow filtering results by categories or attributes.
snBehavior.itemsPerFacetDesc: Maximum number of items displayed per facet category.
snBehavior.highlightingDesc: How search terms are visually emphasized in results.
snBehavior.enableHighlightingDesc: Highlight search terms in the results.
snBehavior.enableSuggestionsDesc: Suggest spelling corrections for user queries.
snBehavior.alwaysShowCorrectedDesc: Automatically display results for the corrected term if a typo is detected.
snBehavior.mltDesc: Recommend similar documents based on content.
snBehavior.enableSimilarDesc: Recommend documents similar to the current result.
snBehavior.spotlightDesc: Featured content promotion in search results.
snBehavior.showSpotlightWithResultsDesc: Display featured content alongside search results.
snBehavior.defaultFieldsDesc: Field mappings for search, display, and content extraction.

snSiteForm.namePattern: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.
snSiteForm.nameDuplicate: A site with this name already exists (case-insensitive).
snSiteForm.nameDesc: Enter a unique identifier for this semantic navigation site. Use only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens. This name is used for API access and will appear in the site list.
snSiteForm.descMaxLength: Description must be at most 500 characters.
snSiteForm.descDesc: Provide a concise summary describing the purpose or scope of this semantic navigation site.
snSiteForm.seInstanceDesc: Select the search engine instance powering this semantic navigation site. This determines which backend is used for indexing and searching content.

snGenai.siteDescPromptDesc: Write a detailed prompt describing what this site contains, its purpose, target audience, and any specific instructions for the AI. This prompt is used by the default LLM configured in Global Settings to generate reports, insights, and emails about this site.
snGenai.siteDescPromptPlaceholder: Example: This site indexes the internal knowledge base of our engineering team...
snGenai.promptTemplateDesc: Define the prompt for the AI agent. Use {{question}} and {{information}} to insert user queries and retrieved content.
snGenai.ragHint: For RAG to work, the prompt must contain {{question}} and {{information}}.
snGenai.enableRagDesc: Enable Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to combine search results with a language model, providing AI-powered answers grounded in this site's indexed content.
snGenai.sitePromptDesc: Describe what this site is about. Used by the default LLM (Global Settings) for reports, insights, and emails.
snGenai.configureLlm: Configure a default LLM in Global Settings to enable.
snGenai.addSiteDescription: Add a site description in Settings to enable.
snGenai.generatePromptHint: Generate a prompt based on the site description using the default LLM.
snGenai.aiModelConfigDesc: Language model, embedding model, and vector store configuration.
snGenai.languageModelDesc: Choose the AI language model for generating answers.
snGenai.embeddingStoreDesc: Select the vector store for semantic search and RAG.
snGenai.embeddingModelDesc: Select the LLM instance used for generating embeddings.
snGenai.systemPromptDesc: Define the prompt template for the AI agent.
snGenai.overwriteDesc: The site description prompt already has content. Generating a new one will replace the existing text. This action cannot be undone.
snGenai.systemPromptValidation: The System Prompt must contain the tags {{question}} and {{information}}.
snGenai.updateFailed: Failed to update site. Please try again.
snGenai.promptGenerateFailed: Failed to generate site prompt. Check the default LLM configuration.

snSpotlight.detailsDesc: Name, description, and language for this spotlight.
snSpotlight.nameDesc: Choose a name to help you recognize this spotlight later.
snSpotlight.nameRequired: Please give your spotlight a name.
snSpotlight.descPlaceholder: e.g. Curated resources for AI adoption
snSpotlight.descDesc: Add a short description so others know what this spotlight is about.
snSpotlight.languageDesc: Pick the language for this spotlight.
snSpotlight.whenSearched: When someone searches for these terms...
snSpotlight.addKeywords: Add keywords or phrases. If a user searches for any of these, this spotlight will appear.
snSpotlight.termRequired: At least one term is required.
snSpotlight.documentsDesc: Documents highlighted when terms are searched.
snSpotlight.chooseDocuments: Choose which documents will be highlighted when the above terms are searched.
snSpotlight.findDocumentDesc: Search and select a document to feature in this spotlight.
snSpotlight.documentRequired: At least one document is required.

snMerge.providerDetailsDesc: Configure source and destination providers for this merge.
snMerge.sourceProviderDesc: Choose the provider you want to merge data from.
snMerge.destProviderDesc: Select where the merged data will go.
snMerge.relationMappingDesc: Define how source and destination data are linked.
snMerge.sourceRelationDesc: Specify the relation from your source provider.
snMerge.destRelationDesc: Enter the relation in your destination provider.
snMerge.aboutMergeDesc: Add context to help your team understand this merge.
snMerge.mergeDescriptionDesc: Add a short note to help you and your team understand the purpose.
snMerge.mergeDescPlaceholder: e.g. Sync user profiles for analytics
snMerge.fieldsToOverwriteDesc: Manage which fields are replaced during the merge.
snMerge.addFieldDesc: Pick a field from your source that should replace the value in your destination.
snMerge.createFailed: Failed to create the merge provider. Please try again.
snMerge.mergeFailed: Failed to update the merge provider. Please try again.

snResultRanking.generalDesc: Basic details for this ranking expression.
snResultRanking.nameDesc: Enter a clear, descriptive name for this ranking expression.
snResultRanking.descDesc: Briefly summarize the purpose of this ranking expression.
snResultRanking.conditionsDesc: Define filter expressions to target content for ranking.
snResultRanking.contentFilterDesc: Specify filter expressions to target content for ranking.
snResultRanking.weightDesc: Adjust the influence of this expression on search results.
snResultRanking.weightAdjustmentDesc: Adjust the influence of this ranking expression on search results.

snLocale.languageSettingsDesc: Configure the language for semantic search and content indexing.
snLocale.languageDesc: Select the language code for semantic search and content indexing.
snLocale.coreConfigDesc: Manage the search engine core for this locale.
snLocale.defineManuallyDesc: Enable this option to manually specify the core. If disabled, the core will be created automatically.
snLocale.coreDesc: The core name will appear in the semantic navigation site locale list.
snLocale.createFailed: Failed to create the SN Locale. Please try again.
snLocale.updateFailed: Failed to update the SN Locale. Please try again.

snField.generalConfigDesc: Core field settings including name, type, and behavior.
snField.nameDesc: Unique identifier for this field. Used for search and indexing.
snField.typeDesc: Data type for this field (e.g., text, number, date).
snField.defaultValueDesc: Value automatically assigned if no value is provided during indexing.
snField.multiValueDesc: Allows this field to store multiple values (e.g., tags).
snField.highlightingDesc: Enables highlighting of matching search terms in results.
snField.enabledDesc: If enabled, this field will be included in search queries and indexing.
snField.requiredDesc: Marks this field as mandatory during indexing.
snField.facetDesc: Enables this field as a filter in the search page.
snField.fieldExists: A field with this name already exists.

snFacetedField.basicInfoDesc: Unique identifier and core field settings.
snFacetedField.identifierDesc: Unique identifier for this field. Used for search and indexing.
snFacetedField.displayLabelsDesc: Names shown to users when browsing filters.
snFacetedField.defaultDesc: The name shown to users when browsing filters. Used when no language-specific label is available.
snFacetedField.facetConfigDesc: Control how facet values are displayed and combined.
snFacetedField.secondaryFacetDesc: Classifies this field as a secondary facet.
snFacetedField.showAllItemsDesc: Displays all possible facet values, even those with zero results.
snFacetedField.facetSortDesc: Determines how facet values are ordered in the filter box.
snFacetedField.operatorBetweenFacetsDesc: Specifies how multiple facets are combined in search.
snFacetedField.operatorBetweenItemsDesc: Defines how multiple selected facet values are joined.

snCustomFacet.basicInfoDesc: Unique identifier for this custom facet.
snCustomFacet.identifierDesc: Give your facet a unique identifier using lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
snCustomFacet.identifierFormat: Use only letters, numbers, underscores (_), or hyphens (-).
snCustomFacet.displayLabelsDesc: Names shown to users when browsing filters.
snCustomFacet.defaultDesc: The name shown to users when browsing filters. Used when no language-specific label is available.
snCustomFacet.selectFieldDesc: Choose the field that will serve as the foundation for this custom facet.
snCustomFacet.facetItemsDesc: Custom filter conditions for this facet.
snCustomFacet.defineItemsDesc: Create custom filter conditions (between, equal, greater than, less than). Drag items to reorder.
snCustomFacet.label: Label
snCustomFacet.itemDesc: Define how this item filters search results.
snCustomFacet.betweenDesc: Value is within a range (start to end)
snCustomFacet.changeFieldDesc: There are range values already filled in this custom facet. If you continue, current range values will be lost.
snCustomFacet.facetNameInvalid: Facet Name must contain only letters, numbers, underscore (_) or hyphen (-).
snCustomFacet.invalidRange: Invalid range on item "{{label}}": Range End must be greater than or equal to Range Start.

snLabelTranslations.addTranslationsDesc: Help users in different regions by providing labels in their language.

agentSettings.generalDesc: Identity and purpose of this AI agent.
agentSettings.titleDesc: A unique, descriptive name for this AI agent.

agentSettings.instructionDesc: Define the role, constraints, and style of responses for this agent.
agentSettings.instructionPlaceholder: You are a helpful assistant that...
agentSettings.instructionHint: This prompt is sent as a system message to the language model before every conversation.

agentTools.availableDesc: Select which built-in tool callings are available to this agent.

intentSettings.generalDesc: Name and description for this intent category.
intentSettings.titleDesc: The category label shown in the chat suggestions.

intentSettings.iconDesc: An icon displayed next to the intent in the chat.

intentSettings.actionPrompt: The prompt that will be sent to the chat...

intentSettings.enabledDesc: When disabled, this intent will not appear in chat suggestions.

integrationSource.generalDesc: Basic information and connection settings for the AEM integration source.
integrationSource.authorConfigDesc: Settings for indexing content from AEM Author instance.
integrationSource.publishConfigDesc: Settings for indexing content from AEM Publish instance.
integrationSource.localesConfigDesc: Locale detection and path mapping settings.
integrationSource.localePathsDesc: Define specific paths for different locales.
integrationSource.specificationsDesc: Attribute specifications define how AEM content attributes are mapped to search engine fields.
integrationSource.specEmpty: No attribute specifications configured. Click Add to create one.
integrationSource.specDetailDesc: Configure the attribute mapping, field type, and behavior.
integrationSource.specNameDesc: The target field name in the search engine index.
integrationSource.specClassNameDesc: Java class responsible for processing this attribute.
integrationSource.specTypeDesc: The data type used in the search engine index.
integrationSource.specTextDesc: The source content path or expression (e.g., jcr:content/jcr:title).
integrationSource.specDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this attribute specification...
integrationSource.specMandatoryDesc: Require this attribute to be present for indexing.
integrationSource.specMultiValuedDesc: Allow multiple values for this attribute.
integrationSource.specFacetDesc: Enable faceted search filtering on this attribute.

integrationSource.modelDetailDesc: Configure the content type, subtype, and target attribute mappings.
integrationSource.modelClassNameDesc: Java class responsible for processing this content model.
integrationSource.targetAttrsDesc: Define how AEM content attributes map to search engine fields.
integrationSource.sourceAttrsDesc: Source attributes define how content is extracted from AEM.
